title: CLI option change is treated as public contract evidence gap
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/cli.py b/src/semantic_guard/cli.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/cli.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/cli.py
@@
+parser.add_argument("--output-mode", choices=["json", "text"], default="json")
+print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
intent: CLI の出力 mode option を追加する。
rationale: CLI flags and output shape are public contracts and need compatibility and representative execution evidence.
